# Elizabeth Zab Art

> Original abstract acrylic pour / fluid-art paintings by Elizabeth Zab, made and shown at her studio inside Salon Lofts in Akron, Ohio. Walk in during studio hours to see the work, pick one up, or commission a custom palette.

## About
Elizabeth Zab is an abstract artist working primarily in acrylic pouring and fluid art techniques. Each painting is poured, shaped with warm air, and finished by hand. Every original comes with a signed Certificate of Authenticity.

- Studio: 3987 Medina Rd, Studio 3, Akron, OH 44333 (inside Salon Lofts, walk in from the main lobby)
- Studio hours: Tue 11:30-3, Wed 3-7, Thu 11:30-3, Fri 11:30-3, Sat 10-2 (closed Sun and Mon)
- Phone: (440) 477-1972
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/elizabethzabartllc
- Service area: Akron, Cleveland, Medina, Hudson, and Northeast Ohio

## Pages
- https://elizabethzab.art/work: gallery of recent original pour paintings
- https://elizabethzab.art/story: how a pour painting is made (the fluid-art / hairdryer process)
- https://elizabethzab.art/studio: visit the studio (address, hours, directions)
- https://elizabethzab.art/designers: for interior designers and realtors (staging, commissioned palettes, client gifts)
- https://elizabethzab.art/qa: questions about pour painting, commissions, pickup, shipping, and certificates of authenticity

## What is offered
Original abstract pour paintings for sale; custom commissions (specific palettes, sizes, and rooms); art staging for realtors and interior designers; signed originals as closing or client gifts. Local pickup in Akron; shipping discussed on inquiry.
